name: rpglitch
description: RPGlitch - AI-powered storytelling platform for Perchance with comprehensive rules system for development

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run validate
scripts.lint: npm run sync:ignores && eslint apps tests build/scripts --config build/config/eslint.config.mjs && stylelint "apps/**/*.{css,scss}" --config build/config/stylelint.config.js --ignore-path build/config/.stylelintignore && node build/scripts/run-htmlhint.js "apps/**/*.html" && markdownlint "**/*.md" --config build/config/.markdownlint.json --ignore-path build/config/.markdownlintignore
scripts.lint:fix: npm run sync:ignores && eslint --fix apps tests build/scripts --config build/config/eslint.config.mjs && stylelint "apps/**/*.{css,scss}" --config build/config/stylelint.config.js --ignore-path build/config/.stylelintignore --fix && node build/scripts/run-htmlhint.js "apps/**/*.html" && markdownlint --fix "**/*.md" --config build/config/.markdownlint.json --ignore-path build/config/.markdownlintignore
scripts.rules:update: echo 'Use "update memory bank" to refresh memory bank files'
scripts.housekeeping: node build/scripts/combine-views.js repo recent && npm run lint
scripts.clean:output: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('build/output', { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('🧹 cleaned build/output');"
scripts.clean:libs: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('build/local_libs', { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('🧹 cleaned build/local_libs');"

author: Glitch
